creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
'2>/dev/null' added to all jobs that create a new jail and execute build in it.

In the future these process would be done by a script file, not from "execute shell" build step, and all unnecessary outputs would be suppressed.  The reason that I haven't changed it is because the machines execute these jobs only have IPv6 address, but GitHub just doesn't support IPv6.  I think this issue can be solved when we have new build machines, or we might need to move our script repository to svn.freebsd.org/base/projects/freebsd-ci .
